creator: osho@pcc-software.org
text:
pop_auth isn't copyed to $PREFIX/bin by ports installation program.
	So,no one can make password file for solidpop3d,
	and then isn't authenticated by solidpop3d.

Fix: 

I copyed pop_auth from $WRKSPC to $PREFIX/bin
How-To-Repeat: 	Just install the port,"mail/solidpop3d"
